test.note: All 271 tests pass - major improvement from Round 1's 7 failures

lint.note: No lint configuration found in project (no ESLint, Biome, or similar)

reviewsSummary.note: All 10 completed implementation features in the milestone have been reviewed. Round 1 reviewed 6 features (all passed), Round 2 reviewed the remaining 4 features (all passed).

featureReviews.summary: Hardened identity continuity for seeded token/contract mappings; 9 of 11 validation assertions covered
Fixed token-list parity and modernized vi.mocked usage; broader chart/range work noted as pre-existing
Recharacterized history/chart test expectations; test-only changes
Recharacterized integration-live-data test expectations for boot/freshness semantics
Added description.en to seeded fixtures; added characterization test
Recharacterized exchange-rate expectations to use contract assertions

Added 4 characterization tests for pagination determinism, error envelope compatibility, and null-vs-omitted field policy. Implementation correctly uses shared parsePositiveInt and HttpError utilities.
Added whenReady() API to MarketRuntime that blocks Fastify ready state until initial sync completes. Tests recharacterized to verify deterministic post-ready behavior.
Hardened 3 brittle array matchers in tests/app.test.ts for trending pools and pool trades. Replaced toMatchObject with robust toEqual forms preserving relationship checks.
Recharacterized frontend contract test to check for non-empty description.en instead of specific fixture string. Aligns with shell script's actual minimum contract.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding lint tool (ESLint or Biome) for code quality enforcement
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: No lint configuration found in project; this was noted in prior synthesis as non-blocking

notes: Round 2 validation PASSES. All 7 test failures from Round 1 are now resolved. The 4 features that were not reviewed in Round 1 have been reviewed in Round 2 and all pass. Validators: test (271/271 pass), typecheck (pass), lint (N/A). No blocking issues found. The milestone is ready for user-testing validation.
